name: Barbequed Pork Ribs/Currant Glaze
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Pork loin back ribs or 1 1/2 lb Spareribs
recipeInstructions:
1. COMBINE THE FIRST FIVE INGREDIENTS AND RUB ONTO THE MEATY SIDE OF THE RIBS. COVER AND REFRIGERATE FOR 2 HOURS.
2. AN HOUR OR SO BEFORE SERVING, START COOKING RIBS 10 TO 12 inches FROM COALS (OR UNDER BROILER), TURNING FROM TIME TO TIME.
3. PORK WILL TAKE 60 TO 70 MINUTES TO COOK DEPENDING ON THE THICKNESS.
4. MEANWHILE, COMBINE RED CURRANT JELLY, ORANGE AND LEMON JUICE WITH MUSTARD FOR THE GLAZE.
5. BRUSH RIBS FREQUENTLY WITH THE GLAZE DURING THE LAST 15 MINUTES OF COOKING.
6. GARNISH WITH THIN ORANGE SLICES BEFORE SERVING.
